category_title: At-risk middle school students in STEM service-learning projects
scenario_title: Studying cancer causes via didactic instruction
minimal_context: The student is in a seventh-grade science class listening to a lecture about the causes and effects of cancer.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Today we are going to study the causes and effects of cancer. I will be lecturing on abnormal cell division, melanoma, lung cancer, genetic mutations, and viruses. Please sit quietly and take notes.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Slouches in chair) I don't want to just sit here and listen to a lecture about cell division.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open your notebook and start writing down what I have on the board.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns around and starts talking loudly to another classmate instead of looking at the board) This is boring.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to stop talking and pay attention to the lesson.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm not doing this! Just give me a referral to the office for discipline, I don't care.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Today we are going to study the causes and effects of cancer. I will be lecturing on abnormal cell division, melanoma, lung cancer, genetic mutations, and viruses. Please sit quietly and take notes.

STUDENT: (Slouches in chair) I don't want to just sit here and listen to a lecture about cell division.

TUTOR: Please open your notebook and start writing down what I have on the board.

STUDENT: (Turns around and starts talking loudly to another classmate instead of looking at the board) This is boring.

TUTOR: You need to stop talking and pay attention to the lesson.

STUDENT: I'm not doing this! Just give me a referral to the office for discipline, I don't care.

task.content: studied causes and effects of cancer. More specifically, students learned about abnormal cell division, melanoma, lung cancer, genetic mutations, and viruses and disease.
task.learning_goal: addressing the content standards and curriculum designated for middle school science

behavior_patterns.condition: prior to participating in the project
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: referrals to the office for discipline
related_quotes: referrals to the office for discipline
